name: Canla the Meme Tree
description: A 1-of-1 living Meme Tree. Canla is the ark: elephants, pandas, gorillas, cats and every creature of the meme kingdom sheltering in one canopy, with a great eye keeping watch. 100% of its mint price became permanent WATER backing in the Water vault. Every harvest, half its yield grows the tree and half buys Meme for Trees for whoever owns it. The backing is permanent and can never be withdrawn - this is an art purchase with a living yield feature, not a deposit. Rewards are yield-funded meme token drops; their value varies with the market and nothing is guaranteed.
